pass1_value.note: Ecwid supports OAuth 2.0 for third‑party/public apps and store access tokens (used as Bearer tokens or access_token query parameter) for custom/private apps.

final_value.note: Ecwid API docs state that public applications must use OAuth 2.0, while custom applications can authenticate API requests using API access tokens passed either as an Authorization: Bearer header or as a token query parameter.
